title: taraxacum lyratum
intro: Taraxacum lyratum is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to East Asia and characterized by its distinctive lyrate leaf shape. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Taraxacum lyratum can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and capsules, allowing for a range of applications in traditional and modern medicine.
